signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Solana Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote passing with 98.27% in favor, positioning Solana as a top high-speed execution layer amid strong network activity like $57B DEX volume in March.[2]
